Description: Verify a book PDF loads correctly in the reader
Preconditions: User is logged in; book with PDF exists
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to /reading/:bookId 3. Wait for PDF to render
Test Data: bookId: valid book ID with PDF file
Expected Output: PDF renders on canvas; total pages shown; page 1 displayed
Actual Output: PDF rendered correctly on canvas element; total page count shown in toolbar; page 1 displayed by default

Description: Verify auto-advance turns pages automatically at set speed
Test Steps: 1. Open a book 2. Enable Auto-Advance mode 3. Set speed to 10 seconds 4. Wait for timer
Expected Output: Page advances automatically after 10 seconds; countdown timer visible
Actual Output: Auto-advance mode activated; countdown timer appeared on screen and page turned automatically after 10 seconds

Description: Verify reading progress is saved when page changes
Preconditions: User is logged in; book is open
Test Steps: 1. Open a book at page 1 2. Navigate to page 5 3. Close and reopen the book
Expected Output: Book reopens at page 5; progress was saved to backend
Actual Output: Book reopened at page 5 as expected; reading progress was saved successfully to the backend database

Description: Verify user can manually advance to the next page in the PDF reader
Preconditions: User is logged in; a multi-page book is open in reader
Test Steps: 1. Open a multi-page book at page 1 2. Click the Next Page button 3. Observe page change
Expected Output: Page number increments by 1; new page content renders on canvas
Actual Output: Page advanced by one successfully; canvas updated to display the next page content without errors

Description: Verify user can navigate to the previous page in the PDF reader
Preconditions: User is logged in; book is open at page 2 or later
Test Steps: 1. Open a book navigated to page 5 2. Click Previous Page button 3. Observe page change
Expected Output: Page number decrements by 1; previous page content rendered
Actual Output: Page navigated back to page 4 successfully; previous page content was rendered correctly on the canvas

Description: Verify user can zoom in to enlarge the PDF content
Test Steps: 1. Open a book 2. Click the Zoom In button 3. Observe PDF scale change
Expected Output: PDF content scales up; zoom level indicator shows increased percentage
Actual Output: PDF content zoomed in as expected; zoom level indicator updated to reflect the increased scale

Description: Verify user can navigate directly to a specific page by entering a page number
Preconditions: User is logged in; a book with multiple pages is open in reader
Test Steps: 1. Open a 50-page book 2. Enter 25 in the page input field 3. Press Enter
Expected Output: PDF reader jumps directly to page 25; page indicator shows 25/50
Actual Output: PDF reader navigated directly to page 25; the toolbar displayed 25 of 50 as the current page

Description: Verify user can bookmark the current page while reading
Preconditions: User is logged in; book is open
Test Steps: 1. Open a book at page 10 2. Click the Bookmark icon 3. Close the book 4. Reopen book 5. Check bookmarks panel
Expected Output: Page 10 bookmarked and accessible from bookmarks panel
Actual Output: Page 10 was successfully bookmarked; it appeared in the bookmarks panel after the book was reopened
